tool.name: privilege_escalation_checker
tool.description: Check for privilege escalation vectors on Linux and Windows systems.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Find SUID/SGID binaries - Check sudo permissions - Enumerate capabilities - Find writable paths - Check cron jobs - Identify misconfigurations

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The check action to perform: - check_suid: Find SUID/SGID binaries - check_sudo: Check sudo permissions - check_capabilities: Find binaries with capabilities - check_cron: Enumerate cron jobs - check_services: Check service configurations - check_writable: Find world-writable files/dirs - generate_script: Generate enumeration script - full_check: Run all privilege escalation checks

parameter.name: os_type
parameter.description: Target OS type: linux or windows (default: linux)

parameter.name: path
parameter.description: Path to scan for certain checks

returns.description: Privilege escalation vectors and exploitation techniques

tool.examples:
# Check for SUID binaries
check_suid
# Full Linux privilege escalation check
full_check linux
# Generate Windows enumeration script
generate_script windows
